description: Create reusable helpers for Lambda/API Gateway handlers that replace the duplicated Next route boundary helpers. Scope: parse cookies from API Gateway events; read the patient access cookie; verify Cognito access tokens; produce no-store JSON responses; enforce same-origin/CSRF checks for browser mutations; parse bounded JSON bodies; read raw webhook bodies with strict byte limits; normalize CORS/allowed-origin behavior for browser-facing APIs; return consistent public error codes without leaking provider/PHI details. This should support the dashboard, billing, and webhook Lambda work. Acceptance criteria: helpers have focused unit tests; existing Lambda handlers can adopt them incrementally; behavior matches current deployed conventions for auth/session errors, cache-control, and origin checks.
title: Add shared API Gateway Lambda request helpers for patient APIs
